name: Shipo.io
author: Poki
description: Shipo.io is an online game that invites you to command your very own pirate ship and set sail on a daring voyage! Have you ever dreamed of being a pirate and conquering the ocean? Now it is your chance to make it happen! Start with a small boat armed with a cannon, fight against your enemies, and claim their treasure. Upgrade your ship with the money you earned along the way. You can also customize your flag and recruit bandits to join your crew. Who is ready to become the ultimate ruler of the sea? How to play Shipo.io? Navigate your ship with your cursor and click to shoot. Who created Shipo.io? Shipo.io is created by Onrush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , and Burger Bounty ! How can I play Shipo.io for free? You can play Shipo.io for free on Poki. Can I play Shipo.io on mobile devices and desktop? Shipo.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
